item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Didn't really feel a lot from this. Has a nice message, but that about it, nothing else stood out to me.

item.title: Operational Staff Post
item.content:encoded: Image is by Яна Сычикова, Сергей Ковачев, under CC BY-SA 4.0.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Wow, I was not prepared to have my heart kicked around like this. There were a few points where the story was a little on the nose for my taste, but any article that evokes emotion from me gets an automatic +1. Good job.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is nothing but excellent. Really love the dialogue. Wish there was a lot more I could say, but that about sums it up anyway. It's really good. mega +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
About a year ago, I decided to write an article about flowers. I spent some time on it, got some thoughts, and then posted it. It failed.

I tried again. It failed again. And then again, same thing.

I'd probably still be in this continual circle of rewriting and reposting if it wasn't for Mayd, who gave me some very valuable core criticism and advice on how to restructure things. We even discussed collaborating on it, but unfortunately life (and covid) got in the way before we could make it a reality.

So yeah. Here's to persistence, and a morning influx of voters that hopefully wont make me eat these words.
